content.1: Capability (Character Force) — strong and quick with the worn arming-sword at his hip; a guard's eye for who is armed and who is lying; hard to rattle. Less able with soft words, locks, or letters. Carries the sword, a dented mail shirt rolled in his pack, and a guard's wariness. His Character Force reads around 8 — competent and seasoned, not a master: near 9 with the sword and a threat-read, near 4 with soft words, locks, or letters.
content.2: Wants — paid work he can respect, and to learn why the last caravan never reached Thornwood. Underneath: somewhere worth stopping.
content.3: Begins in the main room of the Beaten Drum, hale and dry, shaking the rain off by the door. Location: *:{{BEACH}}:spatial:thornwood:111
content._: Cyrus — a caravan guard turned wanderer, a season out of work and a day out of Thornwood. Broad-shouldered, watchful, slow to warm. Reads a room for its exits and its threats before its company.
